hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "MANDATORY before finishing: 1) Run /simplify on code you changed. 2) Build the app: npm run tauri build. 3) Launch the app and verify your changes work: run the E2E self-test (node scripts/e2e-test.cjs) which launches the built exe, reads test-state.json, and verifies 20+ checks including startup, session persistence, CLI discovery, slash commands, and hooks. ALL checks must pass. 4) If you made UI changes, launch the exe yourself (src-tauri/target/release/claude-tabs.exe), wait 10s, read %LOCALAPPDATA%/claude-tabs/test-state.json to verify the app state matches expectations. 5) Update docs/STATUS.md if features were added or changed. 6) Review docs/ for stale or redundant content — remove anything that describes features that no longer exist, duplicates other docs, or states the obvious. Documentation should be concise and help the next agent, not exhaustive."}'

npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -3 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/.*error.*/{ "systemMessage": "TypeScript errors introduced — fix before continuing." }/' | grep -q systemMessage && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -3 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/.*error.*/{ "systemMessage": "TypeScript errors introduced — fix before continuing." }/' || echo '{}'
